task: Show me the list of young female English Spot rabbits available for adoption in Chicago, IL, within 50 miles.
final_result_response:
The results are now fully loaded. With all three filters applied — **English Spot** breed, **Young** age, and **Female** gender — in **Chicago, IL** within **50 miles**, there is **1 pet result**:

- **Joni** — Young • Female, English Spot rabbit, 43 miles away

This is the complete list of young female English Spot rabbits available for adoption in Chicago, IL within 50 miles. The page is now displayed with all the requested filters applied.

Let me click on the pencil/edit icon next to the location to change it.

I can see the Age filter options. I need to select "Young (1-3 years)" which shows (3) results. Let me click on the checkbox for "Young".
